summary: Full bug-scan of Banbansports UNDERGROUND HD per 20-bug matrix. Backend 8/8 pytest PASSED. Frontend: verified each reported bug state via live network capture, video.readyState/networkState/error code inspection, DOM probing (scoreboard/filters/channel-tabs/notif-toggle), SW registration, Sunucu 3 regression check and mobile 390px overflow. Identified the exact remaining issues main agent must fix (Sintel+BBB MP4 broken, English league names, 1.Lig/2.Lig filters still present, penalty field not read, mobile team-name overflow).

ui_bugs.issue: BUG 1 CRITICAL: https://media.w3.org/2010/05/sintel/trailer.mp4 fails to load in Chrome. video.readyState=0, networkState=3 (NO_SOURCE), error.code=4 (MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED). Network shows ERR_ABORTED. Fallback sintel_mp4_alt (download.blender.org) ALSO not reached because primary fails synchronously. Needs alternate CDN.

ui_bugs.component: Video player - demo3 (BIG BUCK BUNNY TRAILER)
ui_bugs.issue: BUG 3 CRITICAL: https://media.w3.org/2010/05/bunny/trailer.mp4 ALSO fails – same error code 4, networkState=3. After 15 s currentTime stays 0, paused=true. Same root cause as Sintel (media.w3.org seems to reject/abort these mp4 requests from this origin). Local /demo3.mp4 (5 MB) already exists in /app/frontend/public/ and should be used directly.

BUG 8 NOT FIXED: Leagues render in ENGLISH from LiveScore API. Observed: 'LaLiga (Spain)', 'Süper Lig (Turkiye)', '2nd Lig: White Group (Turkiye)', 'Turkiye Cup: Final Stage (Turkiye)'. Required mapping: Süper Lig → 'Trendyol Süper Lig', Turkiye Cup → 'Ziraat Türkiye Kupası', 1st/2nd Lig → 'TFF 1. Lig' / 'TFF 2. Lig', LaLiga (Spain) → 'La Liga', and strip (Spain)/(Turkiye) suffixes. Apply Snm→TR mapper in app.js ~line 1677 where stage.Snm is read.

BUG 9 NOT FIXED: Buttons '1. LİG' (data-league=tr1lig) and '2. LİG' (data-league=tr2lig) STILL PRESENT in index.html lines 594-595. User requested these removed. Remove both <button> tags; keep TÜMÜ, SÜPER LİG, ŞAMPİYONLAR LİGİ and foreign leagues.

BUG 10 NOT IMPLEMENTED: LiveScore event object uses Trp1/Trp2 (NOT Tps/Trp as the user guessed). Sample non-FT event keys: ['Eid','Tr1','Tr2','Trh1','Trh2','Eps',...]. For matches ended on penalties the event gains 'Trp1' and 'Trp2' (integer strings) alongside 'Eps'=='FT'. Frontend currently renders only Tr1/Tr2. Must detect event.Trp1 !== undefined && render '(p Trp1-Trp2)' after the main score. Apply in app.js around line 486 (league builder) and in updateScoreboard.

BUG 17: At 390×844 viewport, long Turkish names overflow. Probed values: Beşiktaş t1 sw=95 cw=95 (fits); Alanyaspor t2 sw=102 cw=95 (OVERFLOW), visually clips to 'ALANYASP…'. font-size currently 11.7 px. Add CSS .team-name { overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; max-width:100%; } OR font-size clamp() shrinking further ≤390 px.

BUG (user request d, not listed as numbered bug): user asked 'scoreboard skor bir tık küçültülecek' – current desktop .score font-size=44 px (index.html L159), mobile=26–32 px. Main agent should reduce ~20% on desktop (e.g. 36 px) and proportionally on mobile.

Carry-over from iteration 8: notifications still use hardcoded 'tsl_logo.png'. icons/goal.png, icons/redcard.png, icons/penalty.png, icons/kickoff.png, icons/halftime.png, icons/fulltime.png, icons/yellowcard.png, icons/info.png are ALL reachable (verified 200 OK) but not wired into sendNotification. Also notifications should only fire for matches CURRENTLY shown in match center per new requirement (f).
One asset returns 404 on initial load (console: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404'). Exact URL not exposed by Chrome in headless. Carryover.

integration_issues.flow: Video player for demo1/demo3 fallback cascade
integration_issues.issue: tryNextServer() is reached but since SERVER_ALTERNATIVES[demo1] = [sintel_mp4, sintel_mp4, sintel_mp4_alt] – primary and secondary are identical URLs – it effectively wastes retries before trying blender.org alt. Recommend: [local /sintel.mp4 (if added), media.w3.org URL, blender.org URL] OR just use a single proven local asset. Same for demo3: replace with /demo3.mp4 (already on disk).

integration_issues.flow: Penalty score rendering on match center cards
integration_issues.issue: Match cards and scoreboard both miss Trp1/Trp2. Apply once in a shared formatter so both surfaces show '(p X-Y)'.

issues: league header wraps to two lines
Non-localised English text breaks look-and-feel of Turkish UI

bug_verification_matrix.BUG_2_tears_of_steel: WORKING – HLS blob loads via demo.unified-streaming.com
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_3_big_buck_bunny: BROKEN – same error code 4 on https://media.w3.org/2010/05/bunny/trailer.mp4 (local /demo3.mp4 already exists unused)
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_4_channel_preroll: WORKING – preroll overlay 'REKLAM - PUBG MOBILE (TIKLA)' shown on TRT1 click, ad_pubg.webm plays
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_8_turkish_league_names: NOT FIXED – English names with (Spain)/(Turkiye) suffix
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_9_1lig_2lig_filters: NOT FIXED – both buttons still rendered
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_10_penalty_scores: NOT IMPLEMENTED – correct fields are Trp1/Trp2 (not Tps/Trp)
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_13_server_switching: FIXED – Sunucu 3 (EU) now requests cph-p2p-msl.akamaized.net test stream (NOT Apple bipbop). No infinite retry observed in 15 s window.
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_14_polling_freeze: Partial – no CPU/ws freeze observed but demo3 remains paused (separate BUG 3). No double-polling detected.
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_15_notif_state: OK – class 'notif-toggle denied' + label 'REDDEDİLDİ' shown correctly
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_16_turkish_charset: OK – Beşiktaş / Türkiye / ı ğ ş render correctly
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_17_mobile_team_overflow: CONFIRMED BROKEN – Alanyaspor t2 scrollWidth=102 > clientWidth=95 at 390 px, visually clips
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_18_freeze_overlay: Not reproducible in session – only single retry path observed
bug_verification_matrix.BUG_19_ad_playstore_open: OK – ov.onclick & adClickLayer.onclick both call window.open(ad.url) where ad.url = 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=…'

action_items: FIX BUG 1 SINTEL: media.w3.org mp4 rejected by Chrome – replace STREAMS.sintel_mp4 with a working source. Best option: commit a small local /app/frontend/public/sintel.mp4 (Blender public-domain, 5-10 MB) and reference '/sintel.mp4'. Alt CDNs that reliably serve CORS mp4: https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/SubaruOutbackOnStreetAndDirt.mp4 or https://download.blender.org/durian/trailer/sintel_trailer-480p.mp4 (already in alt list). Current code's alt is never reached because primary 'loads' then aborts instead of firing error handler quickly.

FIX BUG 3 BBB: same story – switch STREAMS.big_buck_bunny_mp4 to local '/demo3.mp4' (already present, 5.1 MB) or Blender: https://download.blender.org/peach/bigbuckbunny_movies/big_buck_bunny_480p_h264.mov → better use local.

FIX BUG 8 Turkish league names: add mapping in app.js renderMatchCenter (~L1677) and scoreboard league builder (~L486). Minimum mapping: 'Süper Lig' → 'Trendyol Süper Lig', 'Turkiye Cup' → 'Ziraat Türkiye Kupası', '1st Lig' → 'TFF 1. Lig', '2nd Lig: White Group' → 'TFF 2. Lig Beyaz Grup', 'LaLiga' → 'La Liga', strip trailing ' (Spain)'/'(Turkiye)'/etc.
FIX BUG 9: delete the two <button class='league-filter-btn' data-league='tr1lig'> and data-league='tr2lig' from index.html (lines 594-595).

FIX BUG 10 Penalty: read event.Trp1/Trp2 (strings). If both present AND Eps=='FT', render score as 'Tr1 (p Trp1) - (p Trp2) Tr2' e.g. Samsunspor 1 (p 3) – (p 1) Trabzonspor. Apply in updateScoreboard + match-card renderer.
FIX BUG 17 mobile overflow: .team-name add overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; max-width: calc(50% - 60px); OR font-size: clamp(8px, 2.8vw, 11px) at ≤390 px.
REQUEST (d) scoreboard score size: reduce .score desktop 44 → 36 px, mobile 26 → 22 px, also .score-separator proportionally.

REQUEST (f) notification variety + scope: implement per-type icon map (ICON_MAP = {goal:'icons/goal.png',…}) and ONLY emit notifications for matches already rendered in #matchesGrid (checkMatchEvents must iterate window._renderedMatchIds instead of all scoreboard fetches).
INVESTIGATE 404: run devtools/Network on preview URL – likely /favicon.ico or a missing icons/* referenced somewhere.
Carryover from iteration 8: scoreboard foreign-match notification guard (isTurkishTeam), consolidate TURKISH_TEAMS & turkTeams lists, break app.js (1926 lines) into modules.
critical_code_review_comments: app.js ≈1926 lines – still violates >700 line guideline; BUG 8/9/10 fixes will grow it further. Split into /app/frontend/public/modules/{video,scoreboard,matchCenter,notifications,ad}.js ESM.
SERVER_ALTERNATIVES entries like demo1:[sintel_mp4, sintel_mp4, sintel_mp4_alt] duplicate the primary – fallback to a distinct source on first error (currently two 'same-URL' retries wasted).
LiveScore event parsing occurs in 3 places (L248, L469, L526, L1677) with divergent field handling – extract parseStageEvent() helper to avoid drift when adding Trp1/Trp2.
Frontend hard-codes Turkish team list (turkTeams) duplicated from backend TURKISH_TEAMS – expose /api/config/turkish_teams from backend and cache in frontend.
sendNotification & sendMatchAlert paths overlap; icon is still static even though icons/*.png set is complete.
playPrerollAd uses _prerollDoneThisSession[currentChannel] to gate per-session – this means BUG 19 re-click cannot be re-verified without refresh. For reliability use a test query-string bypass.
Video fallback relies on 'error' event but media.w3.org returns status=ok but then aborts decode; handle 'stalled'/'suspend' events too with a 5 s timeout before switching.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent applies fixes, re-verify: (1) demo1 demo3 videos actually play (video.readyState>=2 within 5 s, no ERR_ABORTED in network), (2) .league-filter-btn count shrinks from 10→8 (no tr1lig/tr2lig), (3) match card + scoreboard show Turkish league names ('Trendyol Süper Lig', 'Ziraat Türkiye Kupası'), (4) find a FT match with event.Trp1/Trp2 populated (use /api/livescore/date/ for a weekend past date where Samsunspor-TS played) and verify '(p X-Y)' rendering, (5) 390px t2 team name no longer clips. Useful selectors: [data-testid='channel-demo1'], [data-testid='channel-demo3'], [data-testid='match-banner'], .league-filter-btn, .match-card, #team1, #team2, #score1, #score2.

rca_of_the_issue.BUG_1_and_3_w3org_mp4: Chrome's media pipeline aborts media.w3.org mp4 fetches (likely server returns HTTP 200 but quickly drops connection → net::ERR_ABORTED). video element raises error event with code=4 (SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED) and networkState=3. Because SERVER_ALTERNATIVES list has the same URL twice before the real alt, tryNextServer burns 2 retries on the same broken URL. Proper fix is (a) use locally-hosted mp4 files (already have demo3.mp4, need sintel.mp4) and (b) de-dupe SERVER_ALTERNATIVES entries.
rca_of_the_issue.BUG_8_english_leagues: app.js reads stage.Snm+' ('+stage.Cnm+')' verbatim from LiveScore API (lines 486, 1677, etc.) without translation mapping.
rca_of_the_issue.BUG_9_filters_present: index.html lines 594–595 still contain both buttons (probably missed in previous edit).
rca_of_the_issue.BUG_10_penalty_fields: Confirmed via raw LiveScore response the fields are Trp1/Trp2 (strings). Frontend never references them.
rca_of_the_issue.BUG_17_mobile_overflow: .team-name has no overflow rule; font-size clamps but Alanyaspor at ~102 px natural exceeds the 95 px column budget at 390 px viewport.
